generation_logic: Chosen from a fixed catalog of fake businesses; repeated across many posts.

description: Followers count for the business account

Derived from post_date using datetime weekday.
Template-based generation conditioned on sector/language/city/post_type/promo/themes/CTA/dialect; may include hashtags/emojis.
Derived by regex extraction of hashtags in caption_text.
Derived by counting emojis from a controlled emoji pool in caption_text.
Generated as a sector-adjusted fraction of views_count with promo effects and noise.
Generated as a fraction of likes_count; boosted by CTA/promo; carousels have slightly higher comment rates.
Generated from followers_count * post_type view range with boosts from posting hour/CTA/promo/hashtags/themes/dialect and lognormal noise.

description: Whether caption includes a CTA phrase
generation_logic: Derived by searching CTA phrase list inside caption_text (ensures consistency).

generation_logic: Generated ~30% probability with mild sector/time effects.
